name: Miami Consultant Services
description_short: The Credit Xperts is a credit repair company operating in Miami that disputes inaccurate negative items on credit reports to improve credit scores, starting at $149/month.
description_long:
The Credit Xperts operates as a credit repair service based in Miami, Florida, focusing on helping consumers remove negative items from their credit reports. The company has been operating for multiple years and positions itself as a specialist in ethical, legal credit repair practices aligned with Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) requirements. They serve consumers dealing with collections, late payments, judgments, bankruptcies, charge-offs, and public records on their credit files.

The company offers personalized credit repair programs rather than one-size-fits-all solutions. Their primary service involves disputing inaccurate or unverifiable negative items with the three major credit bureaus (Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax). They claim this process can result in credit score increases and provide downstream financial benefits. Most customers start with programs at $149 per month, though pricing varies based on individual credit situations. The company provides free consultations to assess customer needs and recommend appropriate programs.

The Credit Xperts emphasizes ethical and legal credit repair methodology, distinguishing themselves from other credit repair companies through this stated commitment. They highlight FCRA compliance as their foundation, noting that information not 100% accurate or 100% verifiable must be corrected or removed. They position credit repair as a means to help customers qualify for loans, reduce interest rates, lower security deposits, and achieve general financial goals previously denied due to poor credit.

However, important limitations exist. The website provides minimal information about company credentials, licensing, or FTC compliance disclosures. Pricing details are sparse—only mentioning $149/month as a starting point without clarity on total costs or service duration. No customer testimonials appear despite mentioning them. The company's website contains broken navigation links (404 errors on pricing and about pages), raising questions about operational stability. Credit repair effectiveness depends heavily on whether negative items are genuinely inaccurate or unverifiable, which is not guaranteed.
pros: Advertises FCRA-compliant, ethical credit repair approach focused on disputing inaccurate items
Offers personalized programs tailored to individual credit situations rather than standardized packages
Targets multiple negative item types including collections, bankruptcies, charge-offs, late payments, and public records
Reports to all three major credit bureaus (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax)
Provides free initial consultation to assess customer needs
Starts at $149/month, positioning as relatively affordable for credit repair services
Offers ongoing financial health maintenance and debt paydown strategies beyond dispute services
cons: Website contains broken links (404 errors on pricing and about pages), suggesting outdated or poorly maintained web presence
No verifiable company credentials, licensing information, or FTC compliance disclosures visible on website
Pricing lacks transparency—only states '$149/month' as starting point with no explanation of typical total costs or contract duration
No actual customer testimonials or reviews displayed despite claiming 'what our customers have to say' section
Success depends entirely on whether negative items are genuinely inaccurate or unverifiable—no guarantee items will be removed
No information about company history, team qualifications, or accreditations provided
best_for: Consumers in Miami with collections, charge-offs, or other negative items they believe are inaccurate or unverifiable
People seeking affordable credit repair with personalized program design rather than standardized services
Individuals denied credit, mortgages, or auto loans due to poor credit who want to improve scores before reapplying
diagnosis: The Credit Xperts is designed for Miami-area consumers with inaccurate or disputed negative credit items who want professional assistance disputing them with bureaus. The main caveat is that credit repair only works if negative items are genuinely inaccurate or unverifiable—there is no magic removal of accurate, verifiable negative information—and the company's outdated website and lack of visible credentials raise operational reliability concerns.
services: Credit dispute services for inaccurate or unverifiable negative items
Multi-bureau reporting to Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 1682 Coral Wy #2, Miami, FL 33145-2700, USA
